intended_use: The Swoop Portable MR Imaging System is a portable, ultra-low field magnetic resonance imaging device for producing images that display the internal structure of the head where full diagnostic examina
intended_use_full: The Swoop Portable MR Imaging System is a portable, ultra-low field magnetic resonance imaging device for producing images that display the internal structure of the head where full diagnostic examination is not clinically practical. When interpreted by a trained physician, these images provide information that can be useful in determining a diagnosis.
ground_truth: For performance analysis: reference-based metrics using ground truth target images (Swoop data, high field images, and synthetic contrast images). For CNR validation: American Board of Radiology (ABR) certified radiologist annotations of regions of interest. For image validation: side-by-side comparison with Linear Reconstruction as reference standard.
other_metrics: Normalized Mean Squared Error (NMSE) reduced; Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) improved for Advanced Reconstruction vs Linear Reconstruction across all models and test datasets. Contrast-to-Noise Ratio (CNR) for Advanced Reconstruction greater than or equal to Linear Reconstruction for both hyper- and hypo-intense pathologies. Expert radiologist review (5 ABR-certified radiologists) achieved median score of 2 (most positive rating) across all quality categories (noise, sharpness, contrast, geometric fidelity, artifact, overall image quality).
